commands.review_summary:
The PR changes WhatsApp onboarding, config formatting, and pairing approval normalization so phone allowlist entries are stored as WhatsApp digit-only sender IDs while keeping existing E.164 entries accepted at runtime.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main writes WhatsApp setup allowlist values through `normalizeE164`/generic setup normalization, which preserves `+`. I did not run tests because this review was required to keep the checkout read-only.
